class.name: PuertsStringNameCachePool
class.brief_description: Shared UTF-8 cache pool for StringName keys used by Puerts environments.
class.description: [PuertsStringNameCachePool] stores [StringName] to UTF-8 conversion results and can be shared by multiple [PuertsEnvironment] instances. Call [method initialize] before passing the pool to [method PuertsEnvironment.initialize]. Use [member policy] to choose a strategy: [code]POLICY_HASH_MAP[/code] keeps entries in a hash table with a stable hit rate. [code]POLICY_FIXED_HASH_MAP[/code] uses [code]fixed_hash_map[/code] with compile-time fixed storage (1024 entries in this source tree). [code]POLICY_NO_CACHE[/code] disables caching and converts [StringName] to UTF-8 every call. To change that limit, edit [code]FIXED_HASH_MAP_MAX_CAPACITY[/code] in the C++ source and rebuild. Use [member capacity] to control the cache size.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes this cache pool with [param policy] and [param capacity]. For [code]POLICY_FIXED_HASH_MAP[/code], [param capacity] is ignored and compile-time capacity is used. For [code]POLICY_NO_CACHE[/code], [param capacity] is ignored. Calling this method again reconfigures and clears existing entries.

method.name: is_initialized
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] after [method initialize] has been called.

constants.constant: Fixed hash map strategy with compile-time maximum storage.
No-cache strategy. Converts StringName to UTF-8 on every request.
